# Duet Company - AI Documentation

This file provides AI-friendly documentation for the Duet Company codebase.

## Project Overview

Duet Company is an AI-first data infrastructure platform. We help companies build and manage scalable data platforms using AI agents.

## Quick Links

- **Repository:** https://github.com/duet-company/duet-company
- **Documentation:** /docs
- **API:** /docs/api/rest-api.md
- **Vision:** /docs/company/vision.md

## Monorepo Structure

```
duet-company/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/          # Next.js 14 frontend (TypeScript/React)
│   └── api/          # FastAPI backend (Python)
├── packages/
│   ├── shared/       # Shared TypeScript utilities and types
│   ├── ui/           # Shared React components
│   ├── config/       # Shared configuration files
│   ├── agents/       # AI agent implementations
│   └── skills/       # OpenClaw skill definitions
├── infrastructure/
│   └── cloudflare/   # Cloudflare Workers, Pages, D1 configs
├── docs/             # Comprehensive documentation
└── scripts/          # Build and deployment scripts
```

## Tech Stack

### Frontend
- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (React 18)
- **Language:** TypeScript 5.3
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS 3
- **State:** TanStack Query 5
- **Build:** Bun 1.0+

### Backend
- **Framework:** FastAPI (Python 3.10+)
- **Database:** ClickHouse (analytics), PostgreSQL (metadata)
- **AI:** Claude, GPT-4, Gemini (multi-model)
- **Deployment:** Cloudflare Workers

### DevOps
- **Package Manager:** Bun workspaces
- **CI/CD:** GitHub Actions
- **Hosting:** Cloudflare Pages & Workers
- **Database:** Cloudflare D1 (SQLite at edge)

## Key Commands

```bash
# Install all dependencies
bun install

# Start all apps in development
bun run dev

# Build all packages and apps
bun run build

# Run tests
bun run test

# Run linter
bun run lint

# Type check
bun run typecheck

# Format code
bun run format
```

## AI Agents

### Query Agent
Converts natural language to SQL queries.
- Location: `packages/agents/query/`
- Entry point: Query requests to `/api/v1/agents/query`

### Design Agent
Designs data platforms from requirements.
- Location: `packages/agents/design/`
- Entry point: Design requests to `/api/v1/agents/design`

### Support Agent
Provides customer support.
- Location: `packages/agents/support/`
- Entry point: Support requests to `/api/v1/agents/support`

## API Endpoints

### Health
- `GET /health` - Health check

### Platforms
- `GET /api/v1/platforms` - List platforms
- `POST /api/v1/platforms` - Create platform
- `GET /api/v1/platforms/{id}` - Get platform
- `DELETE /api/v1/platforms/{id}` - Delete platform

### Agents
- `GET /api/v1/agents` - List agents
- `POST /api/v1/agents/query` - Execute query
- `POST /api/v1/agents/design` - Design platform

### Data
- `POST /api/v1/data/query` - Execute SQL
- `GET /api/v1/data/schema` - Get schema

### Monitoring
- `GET /api/v1/monitoring/metrics` - Get metrics
- `GET /api/v1/monitoring/alerts` - Get alerts

## Environment Variables

### Frontend (apps/web/.env.local)
```env
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000
```

### Backend (apps/api/.env)
```env
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...
CLICKHOUSE_URL=clickhouse://...
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
JWT_SECRET=...
ENVIRONMENT=development
```

## Development Workflow

1. Make changes in `apps/` or `packages/`
2. Run `bun run typecheck` to verify types
3. Run `bun run lint` to check code style
4. Test locally with `bun run dev`
5. Commit changes with conventional commits
6. Push to trigger CI/CD

## Deployment

### Automatic
- Push to `main` branch
- GitHub Actions runs CI/CD
- Deploys to Cloudflare automatically

### Manual
```bash
# Deploy API Worker
cd infrastructure/cloudflare/workers
wrangler deploy api-worker.ts

# Deploy Web App
cd apps/web
bun run build
wrangler pages deploy .next
```

## Common Patterns

### Shared Types
Import from `@duet-company/shared`:
```typescript
import { User, Platform, AgentResponse } from '@duet-company/shared';
```

### Shared Components
Import from `@duet-company/ui`:
```typescript
import { Button, Card, Input } from '@duet-company/ui';
```

### API Calls
Use the shared API client (in packages/shared/src/utils/api.ts).

## Troubleshooting

### Type Errors
- Run `bun install` to ensure dependencies are linked
- Check `tsconfig.json` extends the base config

### Build Errors
- Clean with `rm -rf node_modules .next`
- Reinstall with `bun install`

### Runtime Errors
- Check environment variables are set
- Verify Cloudflare configuration

## Support

- **Docs:** /docs
- **Issues:** https://github.com/duet-company/duet-company/issues
- **Email:** hello@duet.company
